summary: Executed continuation testing for P0 authorization using local static + UI smoke validation. Security SQL/migration contracts pass static regression tests, but live integration could not be executed because Supabase environment variables are not configured in the running app and remote DB mutation is disallowed.

critical.issue: Live backend/RLS execution not testable in this workspace: no Supabase URL/anon key in runtime; app renders configuration-required screen.

minor.issue: Expected /app/backend tests path is absent for pytest API coverage; current stack is Supabase + Expo app only.

ui_bugs.issue: Root web app blocks on 'CONFIGURAÇÃO NECESSÁRIA' due missing EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY at runtime.

integration_issues.issue: Could not execute end-to-end registration/login/invite acceptance and real RLS matrix against Supabase because credentials/env are unavailable and remote writes are restricted.

action_items: Provide runtime Supabase env (EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) in this environment to unblock live UI/integration tests.
Run supabase/tests/authorization_p0.sql in a validation database (psql/Supabase SQL runner) and attach execution output.
Consider removing or isolating LegacyRegisterScreen from /app/src/app/(auth)/register.tsx to reduce accidental insecure reuse risk.
After env restoration, rerun multi-role live flows (public signup -> superadmin approval -> invite create/accept -> team/appointments authorization checks).
critical_code_review_comments: Security contracts are present in SQL: client-only signup trigger, protected profile auth fields, memberships source of truth, hardened invitation lifecycle, and restricted function grants.

The route currently exports secure RegisterExperience, but legacy registration logic that allows role/tenant metadata still exists in the same file as dead code; this is a maintainability/security footgun.
useTeam correctly migrated to RPC get_establishment_team; useAppointments still relies on relation-heavy selects and should be revalidated against real schema/RLS in live environment.

success_rate.frontend: 20% (bootstrap smoke only; blocked by missing Supabase env)

test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. File warns Supabase vars are absent and prior credentials are compromised for mutation; no remote mutation performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Local static regression now exists at /app/supabase/tests/test_p0_security_static.py and passes. Next agent should prioritize live Supabase-enabled execution (auth flows + RLS SQL matrix) once env is available.
rca of the issue: Primary blocker is environment-level: runtime app has no Supabase public env variables, causing immediate configuration gate and preventing any auth/UI integration tests. Repro: open http://127.0.0.1:4173 -> config required screen appears. Mitigation: inject EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL/EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in runtime, then execute live role matrix and invite workflows.
